name: Fundamental Balling Education - FPE AU
description:
C'mon on and slam, and welcome to the jam!

-¸.·✩·.¸¸.·¯⍣✩[|]✩⍣¯·.¸¸.·✩·.¸-

At Paper School, we take sports very seriously. But they're mainly known for their prestigious Basketball teams, where the best of the best play on their teams. If you think you have a strict coach, you've never met the coaches in this school!
